name: clinical-research-assistant
description: Interactive clinical research assistant plugin for Claude Code and Cowork. Built for general surgery residents — guides through deep literature review, rigorous publication-ready statistical analysis, figure generation, and manuscript writing with step-by-step approval. Includes four commands: /literature-review (PubMed/bioRxiv search + gap analysis + novelty assessment), /analyze (statistical analysis with Excel output), /visualize (publication-quality figures), and /write-methods-results (manuscript Methods and Results sections).
